MINI MINUTES: Appearances: William Shapiro for the Petitoner.

Mr. Shapiro requested a continuance stating that Mr. Plantaniam was traveling in India and would be back in February. In addition, Mr. Shapiro informed the Court Mr. Beard was now deceased and that his estate was worth about 10,000.00 which was going into the trust. The matter was continued to March 10, 2008.
